1. **Cross-product batching (line 54)**: `%(ProtoFile.Filename)` and `%(ValidationRule.Filename)` reference two different item types → MSBuild creates a Cartesian product (3×2=6 executions). Should batch on `ProtoFile` only and list all rules per iteration.

2. **CS2002 duplicate Compile (line 16)**: SDK already globs `**/*.cs`. Using `Include` re-adds `.g.cs` files, causing duplicates. Must use `Update` to set metadata on already-globbed items.

4. **Clean target too broad (line 60)**: `<Compile Remove="**\*.g.cs" />` removes ALL `.g.cs` files, including non-generated ones. Should target only proto-generated files.

5. **Generated files lost when target is skipped**: When `GenerateProtoCode` is skipped (incremental), the `<Compile Include>` inside it (line 36) doesn't execute, so generated files drop out of compilation. Need a separate always-running target to include existing generated files.

<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Proto service definitions -->
  <ItemGroup>
    <ProtoFile Include="protos\service.proto" Service="Greeter" />
    <ProtoFile Include="protos\messages.proto" Service="Messaging" />
    <ProtoFile Include="protos\health.proto" Service="Health" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <!-- Mark generated files with metadata for IDE integration.
       Use Update (not Include) — the SDK already globs **/*.cs,
       so Include would add duplicates causing CS2002. -->
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Update="**\*.g.cs">
      <AutoGen>true</AutoGen>
      <DependentUpon>%(Filename).proto</DependentUpon>
    </Compile>
  </ItemGroup>

  <!-- Generate code from proto definitions -->
  <Target Name="GenerateProtoCode" BeforeTargets="CoreCompile"
      Inputs="@(ProtoFile)"
      Outputs="@(ProtoFile->'$(IntermediateOutputPath)%(Filename).g.cs')">

    <Message Text="Generating %(ProtoFile.Filename) for service %(ProtoFile.Service)"
             Importance="high" />

    <WriteLinesToFile
        File="$(IntermediateOutputPath)%(ProtoFile.Filename).g.cs"
        Lines="// Generated from %(ProtoFile.Identity)"
        Overwrite="true" />

    <!-- Register generated files for clean support -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <FileWrites Include="$(IntermediateOutputPath)%(ProtoFile.Filename).g.cs" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  <!-- Add generated proto files to Compile. Runs after generation but before
       compilation, and has no Inputs/Outputs so it always executes — even when
       GenerateProtoCode is skipped due to incrementality. -->
  <Target Name="IncludeGeneratedProtoCode"
      AfterTargets="GenerateProtoCode"
      BeforeTargets="CoreCompile">
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(IntermediateOutputPath)%(ProtoFile.Filename).g.cs"
               Condition="Exists('$(IntermediateOutputPath)%(ProtoFile.Filename).g.cs')" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  <!-- Validation rules for generated code -->
  <ItemGroup>
    <ValidationRule Include="rules\required-fields.rule" />
    <ValidationRule Include="rules\naming-conventions.rule" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <!-- Validate each generated file against all rules.
       Batch on ProtoFile only — using %(ValidationRule.Filename) alongside
       %(ProtoFile.Filename) would create a cross-product (3×2=6 executions).
       Instead, list all rules per proto file via an item transform. -->
  <Target Name="ValidateGeneratedCode" AfterTargets="GenerateProtoCode">
    <Message Text="Validating %(ProtoFile.Filename) with rules: @(ValidationRule->'%(Filename)', ', ')"
             Importance="high" />
  </Target>

  <!-- Clean up only proto-generated files (not all *.g.cs) -->
  <Target Name="CleanGeneratedCode" BeforeTargets="Clean">
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Remove="@(ProtoFile->'$(IntermediateOutputPath)%(Filename).g.cs')" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>
</Project>

### Summary of fixes

| Issue | Root Cause | Fix |
|-------|-----------|-----|
| 6 validation runs instead of 3 | `%(ProtoFile)` + `%(ValidationRule)` = cross-product batching | Batch on `ProtoFile` only; use `@(ValidationRule->'%(Filename)', ', ')` transform |
| CS2002 duplicate source | `<Compile Include="**\*.g.cs">` re-adds SDK-globbed files | Changed to `<Compile Update="**\*.g.cs">` |
| Clean too aggressive | `<Compile Remove="**\*.g.cs" />` removes all `.g.cs` | Scoped to `@(ProtoFile->'$(IntermediateOutputPath)%(Filename).g.cs')` |
| FileWrites at eval time | Static `<FileWrites>` outside any target | Moved inside `GenerateProtoCode` target |
| Files lost on incremental build | `<Compile Include>` inside skipped target never executes | New `IncludeGeneratedProtoCode` target (no Inputs/Outputs, always runs) |
